news.t: First Trust Launches a Small Cap BuyWrite Income ETF

holdings.infoBox: FTKI is an equity ETF with a total of 169 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cm Inst 289 stock at 4.79%, Argan at 2.73%, Credo Technology Group Holding at 2.19%, MasTec at 2.09%, and Sterling Infrastructure at 2.08%.

overview.description: The First Trust Small Cap BuyWrite Income ETF (FTKI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund seeks to provide current income and capital appreciation by holding a portfolio of US-listed small cap equities, while utilizing a naked call writing strategy on the Russell 2000 Index or on small-cap ETF. FTKI was launched on Feb 26, 2025 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Launches a Small Cap BuyWrite Income ETF
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust”), a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider and asset manager, announced today that it has launched a new ETF, the First ...
